description_long: This object is a triangular slice of cake with three visible layers of vibrant red sponge separated by thin layers of white cream or frosting. The top of the cake is generously covered with a thick, uneven layer of white icing that drips slightly over the edges, giving it a homemade and rustic appearance. The sides of the cake reveal the distinct red and white layers, with the red sponge being the dominant color. The back and bottom of the cake are fully coated in white, likely from the icing or frosting that envelops the slice. The surface texture of the icing appears soft and slightly rough, while the cake layers look moist and dense. There are no visible decorations, candles, or additional toppings on the cake, and it is not displayed on any plate or stand.
description: A triangular slice of red and white layered cake with thick, rustic white icing on top and sides. The cake has a homemade, undecorated appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the three red sponge layers separated by white cream, with thick white icing on top.
description_view_1: Back view displays the cake fully covered in white icing, with no visible red layers.
description_view_2: Side view highlights the red and white layered structure, with the icing dripping over the edge.
description_view_3: Angled top view emphasizes the textured, uneven white icing and the layered red interior.
